title: Apollo Private Credit Fund Marks Down Portfolio on Soured Loans
description: A private credit fund overseen by Apollo Global Management Inc. cut its dividend and marked down the value of its assets amid signs of strain in parts of its loan book.
content: A private credit fund overseen by Apollo Global Management Inc. cut its dividend and marked down the value of its assets amid signs of strain in parts of its loan book.
